title: 2015-2016 Seattle Case & Related Civil Rights Violations
content:
# 2015-2016 Seattle Case & Related Civil Rights Violations

This document analyzes civil rights violations occurring in Seattle during 2015-2016, including malicious prosecution, excessive bail, and Fourth Amendment violations.

## Key Issues

- Malicious prosecution claims
- Excessive bail practices
- Fourth Amendment search and seizure violations
- Due process concerns

## Timeline of Events

Documentation of events spanning 2015-2016 in Seattle jurisdiction related to the broader pattern of civil rights violations.
